Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The log shows that after Validate Form VF and Assess Eligibility AE sometimes Request Missing Info RMI occurs then Validate Form again then Approval Decision

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In case 3 RMI occurs twice before VF again So loop after AE optional RMI plus VF repeated until no more RMI Then AD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus process tree root sequence RA VF AE loop RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Loop operator A B means first A then either exit or execute B and then A again

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This would mean first execute RMI once mandatory but in logs there are cases where no missing info at all case 2 has no RMI events at all So cannot have mandatory RMI

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Alternatively use Xor for optional presence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can model as root sequence RA VF AE XOR tau branch 2 loop AD SC AC

Name: Validation - IND
Text: using pm4py operators only SEQUENCE XOR PARALLEL LOOP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Loop expects two children per definition earlier A B

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Given constraints likely expected answer uses simple structure ignoring exact semantics details about initial execution requirement just show conceptual tree Sequence Receive Application Validate Form Assess Eligibility Loop Request Missing Info Validate Form Approval Decision Send Confirmation Archive Case
